hidden_state.goal: Verify whether their caching layer is actually improving response times
hidden_state.hidden_truth: The cache hit rate is only 12% because most queries have unique parameters — the caching layer is adding latency overhead without meaningful benefit

opening_input: someone on the team says our Redis cache is making things faster but I'm not convinced
behavioral_rules: Skeptical of claims without data. Will challenge investigation hypotheses. Wants to see numbers, not opinions. Has access to metrics dashboards but hasn't looked closely yet.
